title: Lives of sacred poets;
content:
# Lives of sacred poets;

Contributors: society for promoting christian knowledge (great britain). committee of general literature and education, willmott, robert aris
Date: 1834
Subjects: biography, religious poetry, english, history and criticism, poets, english

Pub. with additions in 1839 as vol. 1 of "Lives of English sacred poets." Also available in digital form.
